item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Drawish [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: nikknizz
item.itunes:summary:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.description:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Drawish
(Graphic Apps)
Simple, yet complete drawing program.
Color replacement with conditions
Large number of shapes with many types of filling
Create lines with the mouse or by point A and B or by angle and length
Create shapes even from keyboard with center displayed
Draw with mouse or keyboard
Rich text editor
Fill inside black (useful for eliminating an area or background quickly)
Paste from file with automatic union at the bottom or right or leave in the selection
File saving camera and get code base64 from Camera
Gradients
Semi-transparent pen
Fill with semi transparency
Create charts
Open pdf as images and save images as pdf
Restore point
Reduce to rgb
Object outline
Many effects
Grid and pixel color replacement with right clicks
Multicolor pen
Fusion pen

Version 1.3: bug fixes, improvements.
[read more]

item.title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:author: speed-dreams
item.itunes:summary:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]
item.description:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
https://www.speed-dreams.net/
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base.
[read more]

item.title: renameUsingExif [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: renameUsingExif [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]
item.description:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]

item.title: MailDivert PDF Unlocker [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailDivert PDF Unlocker [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mathew045
item.itunes:summary:
MailDivert PDF Unlocker
(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PDF Unlocker Tool to remove password protection from locked PDF documents and enable PDF editing, copying and printing permissions without any data loss. The tool supports elimination of both user and owner password protection from PDF files. The software carries a simple GUI that ensures easy and effortless execution on PDF unlocking process by both technical and non-technical users. In addition, the dual selection modes of PDF Unlocker Tool allow users to select PDF files/folders as per their requirements. Moreover, the software maintains to keep the data integrity of Adobe files in exact form and creates a new copy of the PDF file making no changes to the original and secured file. Free demo edition of the software can be downloaded for free analysis and evaluation purpose by unlocking 1 PDF absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
item.description:
MailDivert PDF Unlocker
(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PDF Unlocker Tool to remove password protection from locked PDF documents and enable PDF editing, copying and printing permissions without any data loss. The tool supports elimination of both user and owner password protection from PDF files. The software carries a simple GUI that ensures easy and effortless execution on PDF unlocking process by both technical and non-technical users. In addition, the dual selection modes of PDF Unlocker Tool allow users to select PDF files/folders as per their requirements. Moreover, the software maintains to keep the data integrity of Adobe files in exact form and creates a new copy of the PDF file making no changes to the original and secured file. Free demo edition of the software can be downloaded for free analysis and evaluation purpose by unlocking 1 PDF absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MailDivert PDF Unlocker
(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PDF Unlocker Tool to remove password protection from locked PDF documents and enable PDF editing, copying and printing permissions without any data loss. The tool supports elimination of both user and owner password protection from PDF files. The software carries a simple GUI that ensures easy and effortless execution on PDF unlocking process by both technical and non-technical users. In addition, the dual selection modes of PDF Unlocker Tool allow users to select PDF files/folders as per their requirements. Moreover, the software maintains to keep the data integrity of Adobe files in exact form and creates a new copy of the PDF file making no changes to the original and secured file. Free demo edition of the software can be downloaded for free analysis and evaluation purpose by unlocking 1 PDF absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
